column11: Notes
Meets at Granary Square every Wednesday — SAME STREET as Rogue Bachata. Top priority.
Community runners; Islington Mon 18:45. Socially motivated. Real email + phone confirmed.
Tue bootcamp runs; high-energy party-run vibe. Very active Instagram 16K followers.
Creative and diverse community; prefer Instagram DM. Founded 2007 by Charlie Dark.
Tue & Thu 7:15pm — very close to King's Cross. Beginner-friendly and sociable.
One of London's largest and most inclusive clubs. Regular post-run socials.
North London base; founded 1879. Well within reach of King's Cross.
19K Instagram followers. Real email confirmed. Women's social community — love trying new experiences.
Described as London's largest friendliest book club. Young demo 20s/30s — perfect for bachata.
33K Instagram. Free to attend. Multiple London groups forming constantly.
Fourth Tuesday monthly pub social. Young demo. Already social-evening oriented.
Regular Meetup group.
Meets at iconic cultural venues. Creative membership — open to new social experiences.
London's #1 hiking group. 260+ events/year. Ages 25–49 and very socially active. Real email confirmed.
Explicitly social-first hiking. 'Meeting like-minded people' is the stated goal.
Diverse international membership 20s/30s — natural fit for bachata's Latin social culture.
Guided beginner-friendly day hikes. Group social mindset.
Active Meetup group; social hiking focus.
Islington venue — geographically ideal. Mon–Wed leagues. Real email + phone confirmed.
Closest netball league to King's Cross. Mon–Thu evenings. Real email + phone confirmed.
UK's largest adult sports provider. One contact reaches thousands of players across multiple teams.
Social + competitive sessions. Active Instagram. Open game sessions.
UK's biggest LGBTQ+ hockey club. Mixed social team is ideal target.
Europe's largest LGBT+ sports club. Founded 1995. Regular post-run socials.
Fortnightly social meetups. Bachata as an 'experience' angle could work well.
One of the world's oldest photography clubs. Regular exhibitions and social events.
Free; all levels. Regular photowalks — social and beginner-friendly.
WhatsApp channel active. London's leading online/offline photography community.
Led by Flavio Bosi. Creative community; workshops + photowalks.
Female-led; anti-stuffy wine events. Clerkenwell — under 1 mile from King's Cross.
Monthly meetings at beautiful private venues. Women's networking with wine.
Large social wine group. 3K+ members — good reach.

column4: St James's SW1Y, 4 St James's Square
column11: London's oldest dining society. 6+ events per quarter. More formal demographic.
Large foodie community. Running since 2014. Crossover with bachata social culture.
TUESDAY EVENINGS in Holborn — 15 min from King's Cross. International crowd = natural bachata fit.
Global professionals and expats. Tuesday socials. One of London's largest international communities.
Largest language exchange in London. Weekly events. Small entry fee (£2).
Huge expat community. Cultural events. Latin American and global members — natural bachata audience.
World's first gay-inclusive rugby club. BASED IN KING'S CROSS. 13K Instagram. Real email confirmed.
Europe's largest LGBT+ sports club. Post-run pub socials. Annual awards and parties.
WALKING DISTANCE from King's Cross. Queer Book Club + Film Club + socials. Real emails confirmed.
Young inclusive community 20s/30s. Safe-space social events. Perfect demo for bachata.
All-inclusive social events — museums, galleries, nights out. Open social format.
Monthly Farringdon events (under 1 mile from King's Cross). Under-35 CYP focus. Real email confirmed.
London's leading cross-industry young professionals network. Skills sessions and venue events.
Rooftop parties + dancing already part of their scene. Bachata fits naturally. Real email confirmed.
London's LARGEST young professionals Meetup group. 20K members — massive outreach potential.
300+ events. Non-profit tackling loneliness. Activity-social format = PERFECT fit for bachata night out.
Friday socials. WhatsApp community. Young social demographic — ideal.
Free to join. Regular events at top London venues. Active 2025-26 calendar.
